roles.title: Senior Staff Software Engineer
roles.description: Senior Staff Software Engineer in BILL's Product, Network & AI organization, focused on developer experience and backend architecture. I design and build internal developer platforms—standardized local and cloud environments, opinionated tooling, and automation—that make it fast and reliable for engineers to spin up services, ship code, and debug production-like issues. Recently I've been integrating AI-assisted workflows into this stack so that agents can safely introspect, diagnose, and repair development environments, shifting repetitive troubleshooting from humans to automation and shortening feedback loops. Beyond hands-on engineering, I act as an architecture partner and mentor across teams, helping set standards for database migrations, CI/CD, and cloud infrastructure so our platform scales with the business.

roles.title: Staff Software Engineer
roles.description: Staff Software Engineer in BILL's Product, Network & AI organization, focused on backend architecture and developer experience. I implemented and evolved core Elixir services and shared libraries, strengthened patterns for database migrations and CI/CD, and helped teams adopt safer, more standardized ways to ship changes. I built and maintained internal tooling and local development workflows that reduced environment setup friction and production risk, and I regularly partnered with product squads as a reviewer and mentor on performance, data integrity, and cloud infrastructure decisions.

roles.title: Staff Software Engineer
roles.description: Lead application support and special features needed to propel marketing and sales efforts. Participated in architectural design and direction for features to ensure alignment with product needs. Tasked to mentor and help strengthen other developers in both backend and frontend disciplines through code reviews and code pairing. Additionally, assigned to solve the harder problems and establish new patterns to speed up development and help other developers in new feature development.

roles.title: Software Developer II / Senior Engineer
roles.description: Developer, design, implement, and maintain software projects and their individual features. Contributed as a full stack engineer utilizing NodeJS and ReactJS. Engineered reliable, tested applications deployed and orchestrated in AWS. Additionally, assisted in leading architectural design and identifying security concerns during the application lifecycle.

roles.title: Manager, UI Development
roles.description: Manage a development team mix of onsite and offsite members whose focus is on public facing website and content API R&D. Coordinate the planning and grooming of tasks and issue resolutions through a structured agile sprint cadence. Additionally, lead design implementations and UI framework direction for member facing applications. Manage and develop the content API and CMS that provides content to all member and prospect websites and applications using C#.

roles.title: Lead Developer / Senior UI Developer / Offsite Team Manager
roles.description: Lead UI architectural and development direction and implementation. Engineered a content API using C# Web API to deliver content to both public and member facing clients. Implemented application development processes and procedures which include using grunt to build and optimize CSS, JS, SVG, and PNGs into a deployed set to AWS using CloudFront as a CDN.

roles.title: Application Engineer
roles.description: Implemented an Ionic Framework application to facilitate teacher needed actions such as student behavior recordings and attendance. The application was implemented using AngularJS and SCSS and deployed to the Android Play store and Apple Store.

roles.title: Software Engineer
roles.description: Worked with a team to develop Sitrion Social Sites, a social networking plug-in for SharePoint, using jQuery, CSS, JSON, SQL Server, and the SharePoint Object Model. Designed and implemented Lookout360 as a portable ribbon that can be added to any page as a connector to Sitrion Lookout.

roles.title: Software Developer
roles.description: Transformed mission critical business application previously designed into a more robust and scalable solution to support internal and external users. Integrated 3 applications to work together in a single system.

roles.title: Programmer / Analyst
roles.description: Design, test, and implement a broad range of software applications using C#, ASP.Net, and jQuery. Coordinate with business subject matter experts to incorporate business rules, mathematical models, petroleum engineering aspects, and accounting rules into software.

skills.title: Linux System Administration
skills.description: Linux system administrator privately for approx. 15 years.

skills.title: Hobbyist Hacker
skills.description: I utilize much of my commute developing APIs using Go and Progressive Web Applications tooling to build out interfaces.

education.degree: Bachelor in Information Technology Assurance & Forensics
